text:
```json
[
  "RTX 4060 was released May 18, 2023 at $299 MSRP, versus RTX 3060 released January 12, 2021 at $329.",
  "RTX 4060 uses Ada Lovelace architecture on 5nm process, while RTX 3060 uses Ampere on 8nm.",
  "RTX 4060 has 8GB GDDR6 with 128-bit bus (272 GB/s bandwidth), compared to RTX 3060's 12GB GDDR6 with 192-bit bus (360 GB/s).",
  "RTX 4060 has 3072 CUDA cores and 96 TMUs versus RTX 3060's 3584 CUDA cores and 112 TMUs, while both have 48 ROPs.",
  "RTX 4060 has a 2460 MHz boost clock and 15.11 TFLOPS, versus RTX 3060's 1777 MHz and 12.74 TFLOPS.",
  "RTX 4060 has 115W TDP (47.8% lower power consumption) compared to RTX 3060's 170W.",
  "At 1080p, RTX 4060 is 17% faster with 29% lower cost per frame, offering 46% better value and 15.4% higher benchmark score.",
  "RTX 3060 is 3% faster at 1440p and 11% faster at 4K resolution.",
  "RTX 4060 uses PCIe 4.0 x8 while RTX 3060 uses PCIe 4.0 x16, and both support DirectX 12 Ultimate, OpenGL 4.6, and Vulkan 1.3.",
  "RTX 4060 supports CUDA 8.9 while RTX 3060 supports CUDA 8.6.",
  "The GeForce RTX 4060 is recommended as it beats the RTX 3060 in performance tests."
]
```
json_data: RTX 4060 was released May 18, 2023 at $299 MSRP, versus RTX 3060 released January 12, 2021 at $329.
RTX 4060 uses Ada Lovelace architecture on 5nm process, while RTX 3060 uses Ampere on 8nm.
RTX 4060 has 8GB GDDR6 with 128-bit bus (272 GB/s bandwidth), compared to RTX 3060's 12GB GDDR6 with 192-bit bus (360 GB/s).
RTX 4060 has 3072 CUDA cores and 96 TMUs versus RTX 3060's 3584 CUDA cores and 112 TMUs, while both have 48 ROPs.
RTX 4060 has a 2460 MHz boost clock and 15.11 TFLOPS, versus RTX 3060's 1777 MHz and 12.74 TFLOPS.
RTX 4060 has 115W TDP (47.8% lower power consumption) compared to RTX 3060's 170W.
At 1080p, RTX 4060 is 17% faster with 29% lower cost per frame, offering 46% better value and 15.4% higher benchmark score.
RTX 3060 is 3% faster at 1440p and 11% faster at 4K resolution.
RTX 4060 uses PCIe 4.0 x8 while RTX 3060 uses PCIe 4.0 x16, and both support DirectX 12 Ultimate, OpenGL 4.6, and Vulkan 1.3.
RTX 4060 supports CUDA 8.9 while RTX 3060 supports CUDA 8.6.
The GeForce RTX 4060 is recommended as it beats the RTX 3060 in performance tests.
